hero.name: I'M
hero.desc: Full Stack Developer passionate about building impactful digital products. Specialist in Laravel, React, Next.js, CodeIgniter, and Node.js with 3+ years of real experience.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.desc: I am a Full Stack Developer with over 3 years of experience in building innovative and efficient web applications. My expertise includes Laravel, React, Next.js, CodeIgniter, and Node.js. I have a proven track record of developing impactful digital solutions, collaborating with cross-functional teams to achieve outstanding results.

1.name: UNSIKA SEP-T Test
1.shortDesc: Web-based SEP-T (Singaperbangsa English Proficiency Test) platform for UNSIKA students.
1.longDesc: UNSIKA Online Test System is a comprehensive platform designed to support evaluation and examination processes at Universitas Singaperbangsa Karawang. Built with modern technology, offering a secure, efficient, and user-friendly online testing experience.
features: Advanced Question System (Multiple Choice, Essay, Likert Scale, & LaTeX Formula)
Supporting Media (Audio & Image Upload for Questions)
Exam Security (Anti-Cheating Tab Detection & Locked Session)
Analytics Dashboard & Auto-Scoring for Objective Questions
Manual Correction Panel for Essay Questions

2.name: Lab Assistant Attendance
2.shortDesc: Web-based laboratory assistant platform for the Faculty of Computer Science at Universitas Singaperbangsa Karawang.
2.longDesc: Lab assistant management system featuring assistant data management, lab inventory management, duty schedule management, and RFID-integrated attendance system to simplify the attendance process.

3.name: Employee PPE Detection
3.shortDesc: AI-based employee PPE detection system to ensure compliance with workplace safety protocols.
3.longDesc: AI-based PPE detection system that recognizes whether employees are wearing appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) in work areas. Uses computer vision technology to analyze images or video in real-time.
features: Real-time PPE Detection via Computer Vision
